boundary: Visual recovery and redraw planning only. No source image is reconstructed, copied, or generated in this phase.

resolutionRecords.label: Figure 1.13 vector-addition panels (c) and (d)
resolutionRecords.replacementOrRedrawNeed: Compare original figure metadata first; if identity cannot be confirmed, create an original scientifically reviewed redraw rather than copying the candidate pages.
resolutionRecords.scientificDependency: Vector directions and the reported resultant estimates cannot be validated without the panels.

resolutionRecords.label: Elevator height/position-versus-time graph
resolutionRecords.replacementOrRedrawNeed: Recover the original graph or replace both problems with an original graph whose coordinates and axis labels are independently reviewed.
resolutionRecords.scientificDependency: Piecewise slopes, time intervals, and reported elevator positions cannot be independently verified.

resolutionRecords.label: Figure 1.40 bullet velocity-versus-time graph
resolutionRecords.replacementOrRedrawNeed: Recover Figure 1.40 or create a new velocity-time graph and recalculate the problem from its approved coordinates. Do not treat S3-P051 as the same figure.
resolutionRecords.scientificDependency: The transcribed graph coordinates and resulting calculations remain visually unverified.

resolutionRecords.label: Source 002 unresolved attachment placeholders
resolutionRecords.replacementOrRedrawNeed: Resolve each placeholder independently. Use PDF pages as separate evidence only; never reconstruct the missing conversation image from memory or silently substitute the PDF.
resolutionRecords.scientificDependency: Any explanation that depends on an unseen image must remain blocked or be rewritten around a newly approved visual.
resolutionRecords.pilotPolicyNote: Per PILOT_RIGHTS_POLICY.json (approved 2026-07-15), the placeholders relevant to ch01-t02 (S2-SEG019/029/039) and ch01-t03 (S2-SEG019/049) are deemed unnecessary for pilot purposes and will be replaced by original, scientifically reviewed diagrams rather than recovered. This record remains open and unresolved for the non-pilot topics it also covers: ch01-t01, ch01-t04, ch01-t05, ch01-t06, ch01-t07.

publicationRule: A missing or unverified required visual prevents student-facing publication of the dependent content block.
